name: logging
description: Structured request logging (nestjs-pino) with a per-request correlation id (x-request-id). Pretty in dev, JSON in production.
instructions: Every HTTP request is now logged as structured JSON with a correlation id.
Make a request and watch the API logs:  curl localhost:3000/health
Set LOG_LEVEL (debug|info|warn|error) in .env. Logs are pretty in dev and JSON when NODE_ENV=production.
To route Nest's own logs through pino too, add to main.ts: NestFactory.create(AppModule, { bufferLogs: true }) then app.useLogger(app.get(Logger)).
